address.description: The address of the physical store where the account holder will process payments from.

fullPhoneNumber.description:
The phone number of the store provided as a single string.  It will be handled as a landline phone.

Examples: "0031 6 11 22 33 44", "+316/1122-3344", "(0031) 611223344"

logo.description: Store logo for payment method setup.

merchantAccount.description: The merchant account to which the store belongs.

merchantCategoryCode.description: The merchant category code (MCC) that classifies the business of the account holder.

merchantHouseNumber.description: Merchant house number for payment method setup.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the store.

splitConfigurationUUID.description: The unique reference for the split configuration, returned when you configure splits in your Customer Area. When this is provided, the `virtualAccount` is also required. Adyen uses the configuration and the `virtualAccount` to split funds between accounts in your platform.

status.description: The status of the store. Possible values: **Pending**, **Active**, **Inactive**, **InactiveWithModifications**, **Closed**.

store.description: Adyen-generated unique alphanumeric identifier (UUID) for the store, returned in the response when you create a store. Required when updating an existing store in an `/updateAccountHolder` request.

storeName.description:
The name of the account holder's store. This value is shown in shopper statements.

* Length: Between 3 to 22 characters 

* The following characters are *not* supported: **:;}{$#@!|<>%^*+=\\**

storeReference.description:
Your unique identifier for the store. The Customer Area also uses this value for the store description.

 * Length: Between 3 to 128 characters

* The following characters are *not* supported: **:;}{$#@!|<>%^*+=\\**

virtualAccount.description: The account holder's `accountCode` where the split amount will be sent. Required when you provide the `splitConfigurationUUID`.
